---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for ClipContext
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What's missing or awkward today? What are you trying to do that ClipContext
doesn't support well?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen. If you have a specific approach in mind,
describe it — but it's fine to just describe the desired outcome.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why you didn't prefer them.

## Scope check

- [ ] This doesn't require changing an existing Pydantic schema or API
      contract (if it does, say so — that's fine, just flag it)
- [ ] This doesn't require a new paid third-party service (if it does,
      say so)

## Additional context

Links, mockups, related issues, etc.
